heading: Required Access
body:
To delete a private endpoint, you must have [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) access to the project.
Users with [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) access must add themselves as a `Project Owner`
to the project before setting up a private endpoint.

Atlas CLI

To remove the specified Data Federation private endpoint from your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas dataFederation privateEndpoints delete <endpointId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas dataFederation privateEndpoints delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dataFederation-privateEndpoints-delete).

Atlas Administration API

Atlas UI
